prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 理科/物理类最低位次约 21202→34780→31121→31182→32426，2022年因省控线下降等因素位次大幅后移约1.3万名，2023–2025年基本稳定在3.1–3.5万区间，近3年波动幅度约1300名；2025年基准约32426名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年21人、2022年25人、2023年28人、2024年43人、2025年69人，呈持续大幅扩招态势；2026年计划75人，较2025年再扩招6人（+8.7%），扩招幅度虽较前几年有所收窄但仍为正向，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第170名持续上升至2026年第137名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力与认可度有所增强；2022年曾因食堂宿舍问题出现偏负面舆情，2026年声誉评价为中性/混合（图书馆占座物品处理事件），整体无明显正面或负面冲击；抖音热度总排名第104位、评价为"一般"，关注度不高；未见投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中宁夏大学无A-及以上等级学科，优势学科不突出，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校物理类招生专业（网络工程、智能科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化等）方向契合，相关专业报考热度对整体位次有一定支撑；山西省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓解；宁夏大学位于宁夏银川，距山西较远，属于跨省求学；该校在山西招生计划持续扩大，2026年物理类计划75人，在宁夏大学省外招生中占比较高，地域偏好因素对位次影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次32426名、2026年扩招8.7%、山西省物理类考生减少3.4%（竞争缓解）、学校软科排名持续提升（吸引力增强）等多重因素，扩招带来的竞争加剧效应略强于考生减少的缓解效应，但学校排名提升对报考有一定正向拉动；预测最低位次约33918名，区间33418–34418名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 网络工程（与中软国际共建项目）
- 智能科学与技术
- 电气工程及其自动化。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 数学与应用数学（师范类）
- 机械工程

- 软件工程（办学地点中卫校区）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 葡萄与葡萄酒工程
- 草业科学

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间33418–34418名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业可冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如33000名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化、智能科学与技术等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（如34000名以外）建议以二档中机械工程、化学工程与工艺为主，三档保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 21202→34780→31121→31182→32426. In 2022, due to factors such as a decrease in the provincial control line, the ranking significantly dropped by about 13,000 places. From 2023 to 2025, it stabilized in the range of 31,000 to 35,000, with a fluctuation of about 1,300 places in the last three years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 32,426. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 21 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 43 in 2024, and 69 in 2025, showing a continuous and significant expansion. The 2026 plan is 75, an increase of 6 (8.7%) compared to 2025. Although the expansion rate has narrowed compared to previous years, it remains positive, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university. The Soft Science main ranking has risen from 170th in 2021 to 137th in 2026, showing steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition. In 2022, there was negative public opinion due to cafeteria and dormitory issues. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (library seat reservation incident), with no significant positive or negative impact. Douyin heat ranking is 104th, rated as 'average', with low attention. No records of admission gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ningxia University has no A- or above disciplines, with no prominent advantageous disciplines, limiting its appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have consistently high social popularity, aligning with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors (Network Engineering, Intelligent Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.). The popularity of related majors provides some support for overall rankings. In 2026, there are 167,419 Physics Category examinees in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, far from Shanxi, requiring cross-province study. The university's enrollment plan in Shanxi continues to expand, with 75 Physics Category places in 2026, accounting for a relatively high proportion of Ningxia University's out-of-province enrollment. The impact of geographical preference on rankings is neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 32,426, an 8.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, a 3.4% decrease in Shanxi Physics Category examinees (easing competition), and the continuous improvement in Soft Science ranking (enhanced appeal), the intensifying effect of enrollment expansion on competition slightly outweighs the easing effect of the decrease in examinees. However, the improvement in university ranking positively boosts applications. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 33,918, with a range of 33,418 to 34,418.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Network Engineering (Cooperative Project with ChinaSoft International)
- Intelligent Science and Technology
- Electrical Engineering and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Teacher Training)
- Mechanical Engineering
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Software Engineering (Campus in Zhongwei).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Viticulture and Enology
- Grassland Science
- Smart Agriculture
- Tourism Management (Campus in Zhongwei).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 33,418 to 34,418, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 33,000), focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Intelligent Science and Technology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 34,000), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Mechanical Engineering and Chemical Engineering and Technology, with Tier 3 majors as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2992→3513→3701→5601→6430, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3438 places over the past 4 years, averaging about 860 places per year; the baseline for 2025 is about 6430 places; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 6 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 11 in 2025, showing an overall expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 16, an increase of 5 (+45.5%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 170th in 2021 to 137th in 2026, with a stable improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength; in 2022, there was some negative public opinion due to cafeteria and dormitory issues, and the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, overall stable; Douyin popularity is average, with low attention; no record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ningxia University has no A- or above disciplines, and its advantages in humanities, history, and philosophy are not prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for liberal arts majors such as History, English (Teacher Training), and Ideological and Political Education is divided and wait-and-see; teacher training majors still have some appeal due to stable employment; the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province in 2026 is 63,113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025, greatly easing competition; Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, far from Shanxi, making it a cross-province study; the university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Shanxi has been continuously expanding, with 16 history category places in 2026, a 167% increase from 2021.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 6430, the significant 45.5% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the sharp 25.6% decrease in Shanxi history category examinees (greatly easing competition), the competition intensification effect from expansion and the easing effect from the decrease in examinees offset each other, but the expansion rate far exceeds the examinee decrease rate, so the overall ranking will still shift backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8084, with a range of 7584–8584.

- English (Teacher Training) (requires oral exam).
